<!-- Keep PRs focused: one logical change. Describe the why, not just the what. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off the latest `main`
- [ ] One focused change (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behaviour change
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Docs / help text / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
